lever: lazy repeat-run (RLE) backed left output lanes for the dense i64 inner join: new private ScalarValues::LazyRepeatRunsInt64 ((value,run_len) pairs, O(runs) memory, parallel row-chunked expansion on demand) + Column::from_i64_repeat_runs + dense join emits left lanes as runs when avg fanout >= 2
scenario: inner_join 100000x3 (512 distinct keys -> 19.5M output rows), 3 iters (perf_profile, release-perf, 64-core host)

paired_hyperfine_forced_read_gate.scenario: NEW perf_profile inner_join_read: same join + as_i64_slice sum over EVERY output column each iter (forces full RLE expansion)
paired_hyperfine_forced_read_gate.speedup: 1.10x +/- 0.14 — parity-to-slightly-faster; NO regression when consumers force materialization
paired_hyperfine_forced_read_gate.note: first cut had SERIAL OnceLock expansion and regressed this gate 2.2x (121->268 ms/iter); fixed by row-chunking the expansion across scoped threads (same disjoint split_at_mut scheme as the join fill, gate len>=1<<18)

mechanism: left lanes of a fanout join are pure repeat runs (each matched left value repeated bucket_len times); emitting (value,run_len) pairs carries O(matched)=1.6MB instead of O(output)=156MB per lane — 2 of 3 lanes in the bench never materialize (join-only consumers: len/head/right-column reads). RLE-pays gate output_len >= 2*matched keeps 1:1 joins (join_1to1) on the full fill where runs would double memory.

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes - the matched list IS the left probe order; expanding RepeatRuns reproduces exactly the bytes the Full fill writes
isomorphism.representation: Column::from_i64_repeat_runs == from_i64_values(expanded): same dtype/validity/values/as_i64_slice; ScalarValues serde+PartialEq+Debug all route through as_slice; unit test asserts lazy==eager Column equality
isomorphism.fallbacks: serial fill, low-fanout joins, all non-i64/nullable paths unchanged
isomorphism.sink_check: join sink=58594080 and read sink=600917179650 identical before/after (read sink covers every output value)

test_gates.fp-join --lib --tests: 102 passed, 0 failed (new dense_i64_inner_high_fanout_emits_repeat_run_left_lanes test pins the RLE path + lazy==eager Column equivalence)
